info.title: Articles Service
info.description: API for indexing press articles and linking them to outlets, journalists, and topics

type.description: Whether this author is a person or an organization (news agency, editorial team, etc.)

firstName.description: First name (empty for organizations or single-name authors)

lastName.description: Last name, or full name for organizations

post.summary: Create or upsert an article by URL

get.summary: Get a single article by ID

post.summary: Create or upsert a topic by name
Link an article to a campaign context (org/brand/feature/campaign)

200.description: List of discoveries with article data

post.summary: Bulk link articles to campaign contexts
Discover recent articles from an outlet via Google News + scraping, and create scoped discoveries
Discover recent publications by a journalist and create scoped discoveries

get.description: Get aggregated discovery stats optionally filtered by orgId, brandId, campaignId, workflowSlug, featureSlug, workflowDynastySlug, and/or featureDynastySlug. Dynasty slug filters resolve to all versioned slugs via the respective service. When groupBy is provided, returns grouped results.

schema.description: Filter by workflow dynasty slug (resolves to all versioned slugs via workflow-service)

parameters.description: Filter by workflow dynasty slug (resolves to all versioned slugs via workflow-service)
parameters.name: workflowDynastySlug

schema.description: Filter by feature dynasty slug (resolves to all versioned slugs via features-service)

parameters.description: Filter by feature dynasty slug (resolves to all versioned slugs via features-service)
parameters.name: featureDynastySlug

200.description: Aggregated stats (flat or grouped depending on groupBy parameter)

get.description: Same as GET /v1/stats but only requires X-API-Key (no x-org-id, x-user-id, x-run-id headers). Used by other services for stats aggregation.

schema.description: Filter by workflow dynasty slug (resolves to all versioned slugs via workflow-service)

parameters.description: Filter by workflow dynasty slug (resolves to all versioned slugs via workflow-service)
parameters.name: workflowDynastySlug

schema.description: Filter by feature dynasty slug (resolves to all versioned slugs via features-service)

parameters.description: Filter by feature dynasty slug (resolves to all versioned slugs via features-service)
parameters.name: featureDynastySlug

200.description: Aggregated stats (flat or grouped depending on groupBy parameter)
